75759.subject: Why This July Rally Could Be a Trap
75759.body:
Adrian's DeFi Insights 

Автор: Adrian Pape


Автор: Adrian Pape

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/why-july-rally-could-trap-adrian-pape-avhfe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BeSNK5%2B%2BxT7eXOeMiuDYlcw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0lVosH84dADsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrewluzr~1s-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrewluzr-1s
  
Hey, it's Adrian, Bitcoin is doing the thing it usually does in July of a bear market: bouncing. What’s new this week is the company causing the most stress for the crypto market recently. Strategy, the firm that has never sold a meaningful amount of Bitcoin in its history, sold some. Cash needed for dividends, they said. The market shrugged at the actual sale and then punished the one instrument that got safer because of it. That contradiction is where this week’s signal is hiding, in the reaction rather than the bounce itself. Meanwhile the ETFs, blamed for most of the drawdown, just posted their first net inflow week in two months. Two “good news” stories, one price that hasn’t decided what to do with either. Let’s get into the broader picture and how to set up for the coming months: ️ ⚡ On today's Episode: 📈 Market Update – Seasonality and Strategy’s first-ever Bitcoin sale are pulling the market’s attention in opposite directions, and neither is telling you the cycle low is close. 🐂 Alpha Insights – Two projects are moving for very different reasons. One on hype the business hasn’t earned yet, one on fundamentals finally catching up. Bitcoin is trading around $63k, sitting almost exactly on its 200-week moving average (a long-run trend line built from the average price of the last 200 weeks, a level that’s acted as a floor in past cycles and a ceiling when the trend turns). It’s exactly this level where the market typically stalls before committing to a real direction. And it has always been a bullish one before. 12-month returns positive: 100% of occurrences 24-month returns positive: 100% of occurrences Four cycles. Seven reclaims of the 200WMA. Zero red outcomes. Median forward returns: 12 months: +153% 24 months: +572% Zoom out to seasonality and June behaved. In the last two bear markets, June was deep red, followed by a July bounce, exactly what’s playing out now. Both of those cycles then turned red again in August and September before the final low landed in Q4. A good July doesn’t rule out a rough Q3. Compare this year to past midterm-election years (years the US holds congressional elections, historically tied to softer risk appetite) and Bitcoin is still outperforming the average path, though that path mostly shows consolidation here before renewed weakness in August. Then there’s the ETFs, which cuts both ways. Bitcoin spot ETFs j

75757.subject: 👑 OpenAI dethrones Fable with GPT 5.6
75757.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $64,165 (2.2%) | **ETH** $1,783 (1.8%) | **SOL** $79 (1.4%)

* OpenAI releases [GPT 5.6](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2075271421149020426?s=20) family of models and [GPT Work](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2075274271845404744?s=20)

* Israel intelligence shares Iranian [plot to kill Trump](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2075332463610737026?s=20)

* Robinhood [surpasses Hyperliquid](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2075332951349264619?s=20) in 24 hour DEX volume

* Meta releases [Muse Spark 1.1](https://x.com/finkd/status/2075218444056707458?s=20) agentic and coding model — Announces new in house [“Iris” chip](https://x.com/tokens/status/2075278888918475158?s=20) will release in September

* The CFTC [halts](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2075230746290118732?s=20) the launch of 24/7 oil futures

* BitGo launches [quantum protection tools](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2075249555327656168?s=20) for institutional Bitcoin wallets

* JP Morgan says private blockchains released by traditional finance pose more of a [risk to Bitcoin](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2075268104519659888?s=20) than Strategy

* Total prediction market volume hits[ new ATHs](https://x.com/tokens/status/2075271273920508318?s=20) — Goldman Sachs restricts employee [prediction market use](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2075373721293058504?s=20)

* Polymarket files for [margin trading license](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2075387847696339417?s=20) in US

* Mark Andreesen joins the Fed as an [AI advisor](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2075294122471276825?s=20)

* fomo launches [Robinhood chain support](https://x.com/fomo/status/2075294725528035631?s=20)

* Crypto posts 3rd straight quarter of [negative returns](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2075404684295291120?s=20)

* Bitcoin ETFs record $95M in daily [net outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2075431896444702763?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/openai-dethrones-fable-with-gpt-5-6

Fear and Greed is at
31
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$64K
this morning. Bitcoin gained roughly 3% overnight, its strongest
single-day move in two weeks, as ETF inflows returned and short
liquidations added fuel to the move.

The recovery is fragile but the direction has shifted. While
price action stabilises, today's stories are about what is being
built and what is being secured underneath the market. Security
threats are growing, regulatory frameworks are tightening, and AI
is doing something it has never done before inside a major
blockchain's core code.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Sony Bank Just Got Approval to Issue a US Stablecoin

Sony Bank received conditional OCC approval on July 2 to
charter Connectia Trust, a New York-based national trust bank
that will issue US dollar stablecoins. The company intends the
token to be used for payments across Sony's digital ecosystem
including PlayStation and Crunchyroll.

Operations are not expected to begin until 2027, pending final
OCC approval.

Which infrastructure firm is Sony using to manage stablecoin
issuance and reserves?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/trvCQtpXUuWeWo-oG0yRRw~~/AAQRxRA~/ihpGt7XbF65FLCBowVud9YPZBqBdKMojQOM7xPFgnwi2EPrIV-brMuP7RIgiQIb6GWx65Z0iOEKdMbAVH3R5iX2bypbPyVO4WyecTJlyQn89gYvqZ6uF-wStJc4J2WXM-lW0i-A9RUxxYhkNnarLlmKhvHKRHxkn85xZwZfjM3TJSWjk2i0DgctbJHpNshi0dh06DOysxc6mpl8f-_AHkoZz32m0X

75753.subject: Вы когда-нибудь чувствовали, что родились не в том месте?🤔
75753.body:
͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  
 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
Здравствуйте, Олег! Уверена, вы хотя бы раз замечали такое в своём окружении: человек, который годами ходил по кругу. Не было ни роста, ни перемен, ни ощущения, что жизнь движется вперёд. Работа не та, отношения не те, энергии нет. И так год за годом.
А потом -- переезд. В другую страну, в другой город. И всё. Как будто кто-то нажал reset. Новая работа, новые люди, новая она. Расцвела буквально за год.
Вы смотрели на это и думали: как так получилось? Она ведь не изменилась. Та же самая личность. Почему там -- и вдруг всё? Ответ вас удивит.
Ваша натальная карта фиксирует точное положение планет в момент вашего рождения. Большинство людей используют её, чтобы понять себя -- свои сильные стороны, паттерны, то, как они любят и работают.
 Найти своё место в мире [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/astromap/master-astromap?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Каждая планета прокладывает линию по всему глобусу. И там, где вы живёте, путешествуете или проводите много времени -- вы активируете определённую энергию. Одни линии раскрывают вас. Другие тихо работают против -- сколько бы вы ни старались. Это астрокартография.
Именно она объясняет, почему тот человек из вашего окружения расцвёл после переезда. Не потому что он изменился. А потому что оказался в своём месте.
И у вас тоже есть такое место. Возможно, вы уже живёте в нём. Возможно, оно совсем рядом. Или на другом конце света.
Вопрос только в том -- знаете ли вы, где оно.
 Найти своё место в мире [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/astromap/master-astromap?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Мы создали персональный письменный анализ, который точно отвечает на вопрос: где ваше место силы прямо сейчас и почему.
С учётом всех активных транзитов 2025-2026 -- не абстрактно, а лично для вас и для этого конкретного момента вашей жизни.
Что в
